title: best herbal teas for allergy
description: Urtica dioica tea contains bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to alleviate allergy symptoms. The properties of this herbal tea, including its anti-histaminic and anti-inflammatory effects, also contribute to its potential in treating allergy ailments.
